'''yachudu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:iberulite|iberulite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-ch-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iberulite|iberulite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| yachudu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæchidith|yæchidith]] || [[word:yæchidij|yæchidij]] || [[word:yæchidish|yæchidish]] || [[word:yæchidi|yæchidi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yachuchuduth|yachuchuduth]] || [[word:yachuchuduj|yachuchuduj]] || [[word:yachuchudush|yachuchudush]] || [[word:yachuchudu|yachuchudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yachuduth|yachuduth]] || [[word:yachuduj|yachuduj]] || [[word:yachudush|yachudush]] || [[word:yachudu|yachudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yachufdufth|yachufdufth]] || [[word:yachufdufj|yachufdufj]] || [[word:yachufdufsh|yachufdufsh]] || [[word:yachufduf|yachufduf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yachuduthu|yachuduthu]] || [[word:yachuduju|yachuduju]] || [[word:yachudushu|yachudushu]] || [[word:yachuduku|yachuduku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yachuduth|yachuduth]] || [[word:yachuduj|yachuduj]] || [[word:yachudush|yachudush]] || [[word:yachudu|yachudu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yachuduthul|yachuduthul]] || [[word:yachudujul|yachudujul]] || [[word:yachudushul|yachudushul]] || [[word:yachudukul|yachudukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yachuduuthuthu|yachuduuthuthu]] || [[word:yachuduujuju|yachuduujuju]] || [[word:yachuduushushu|yachuduushushu]] || [[word:yachuduuku|yachuduuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yachuduthun|yachuduthun]] || [[word:yachudujun|yachudujun]] || [[word:yachudushun|yachudushun]] || [[word:yachudukun|yachudukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yachuduthuoro|yachuduthuoro]] || [[word:yachudujuoro|yachudujuoro]] || [[word:yachudushuoro|yachudushuoro]] || [[word:yachudukuoro|yachudukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d5728ff}}
